honest_note: Found 'When cells think' (PMC12418969) which explicitly draws epigenetic-regulation ↔ neural-network analogy. Plus 'Stochastic modeling of epigenetic memory' (Nature 2026) provides the formal model. The vernalization-specific FLC-PRC2 instance isn't directly imported to LLM context, but the umbrella analogy is established and the formal stochastic model already exists in biology. Continued pattern of saturation at the umbrella-analogy level even when specific sub-mechanism is unused.
